title: Corporate Financing Decisions: Debt financing always increases the value of a firm due...
summary: Evaluate how interest deductibility creates a tax shield increasing levered firm value.
prompt: Debt financing always increases the value of a firm due to tax shields.
solution: While debt financing can provide tax advantages because interest payments are tax-deductible, it does not always increase a firm's value. Excessive debt can lead to increased financial distress and potential bankruptcy costs, which can offset the benefits of tax shields.
